# Heritage Restoration
> Professional fire, water, and storm damage restoration across Western Washington. IICRC certified, 24/7 emergency response, locally owned and operated since 2004. We are homeowner advocates — our priority is protecting your interests, not the insurance company's.

## About
Heritage Restoration Inc. is a full-service property restoration contractor serving Western Washington State. Founded in 2004 and locally owned, we handle the complete complexity of disaster recovery for homeowners — from emergency response and mitigation through full structural reconstruction.

- **Phone:** (360) 345-1015
- **Email:** office@firewaterstorm.com
- **Emergency:** 24/7 dispatch available
- **Response time:** 60 minutes in service area
- **Certifications:** IICRC Certified Firm
- **Warranty:** 5-Year Workmanship Warranty

## Office Locations
- **North Office:** 7895 Martin Way E, Unit 103, Lacey, WA 98516 (serving Lacey, Olympia, Tumwater, Tacoma, Federal Way)
- **South Office:** 1581 N. National Ave, Chehalis, WA 98532 (serving Chehalis, Centralia, Lewis County)

## Services

### [Fire Restoration](/services/fire-restoration)
Comprehensive soot and smoke remediation, structural debris removal, full structural rebuild to modern building codes. We handle insurance coordination from start to finish.

### [Water Restoration](/services/water-restoration)
Rapid water extraction, structural drying, mold prevention using IICRC-certified mitigation standards. Direct insurance billing available.

### [Storm Recovery](/services/storm-recovery)
Emergency roof tarping, tree and debris removal, window and door board-ups, and complete structural reconstruction following severe Pacific Northwest weather events.

### [Contents Services](/services/contents-services)
Professional pack-out, digital inventory tracking, specialized cleaning, and climate-controlled secure storage for personal belongings during home reconstruction.

## Why Heritage
- Locally owned — not an out-of-town franchise
- We advocate for homeowners, not insurance companies
- Direct access to local leadership and project managers
- 1,800+ projects completed since 2004
- 20+ years serving Western Washington
